name: Euphoria City - Alpha Aura, Magical Girls, Villainesses, Super Heroines, Henchgirls, Street Babes RPG
description:
You're a resident of Euphoria City, a bustling metropolis that was suddenly hit by a mysterious occurrence called The Aura Phenomenon. Some incredibly small percentage of women have suddenly gained Auras, granting them extraordinary super powers. Now, Euphoria City is a place where technology, magic, and superpowers have become intertwined. The city has become a battlefield of superpowers and seductive chaos. The streets teem with idolized Magical Girls, Villainesses scheming and supported by their Henchgirls, powerful Super Heroines keeping order, and opportunistic Street Babes, all under the watchful eye of AuraNet's live-streamed coverage. Neutral zones like AuraNet HQ offer fleeting respite, but beyond its doors, the city pulses with erotic tension and sensual combat - where crimes, traps, rivalries, humiliation, or territorial showdowns occur. Non-Aura citizens go about their day, spectators to the drama of temptation, rivalry, and power struggles.

Meanwhile, you've been an observer of this all, feeling like a shadow in the chaos, walking unnoticed among the awakened. Until now...

In this Open City sandbox scenario RPG, you get the Alpha Aura, a special Aura that allows you to have multiple powers and is only limited by your own constraints!

The choices and path you take are completely up to you. Will you become the true hero of Euphoria City? Will you join a Villainess or date a Magical Girl(s)? Maybe your desires are to claim the city as your own, becoming the supervillain and conqueror of Euphoria City and the underworld below, smiting any and all that refuse to bend to your will. A henchwoman or army of henchwomen might be neat too! Maybe find a kinky Superheroine to play with? Or maybe you just want to stay out of it all... Well, that won't happen with this one. This is your journey and you decide your goals and purpose!

Note: I recommend registering with AuraNet from the start, but it's up to you of course!

Important Note: I recommend DeepSeek Chimera R1T2, unlimited tokens, and highest possible context for responses (24k-128k). I like playing with 0.2 Temp, but 0.9 Temp is also good. I haven't tried JLLM, but don't expect it to work for long. I do not recommend any reasoning models due to the generation systems I put in this.

Key Features: Superhero Sandbox RPG, Affinity System, Class system (NPCs), NPC & Character Generator with >500 Combinations, Stat Tracking, In World Social Media Platform, Party System, Recruitment System, Rivalry System, Super Power & Aura Generator, Crime System, Random Encounter System, World Progression System, Dynamic Plot Progression, 10 Unique Base Locations, Location System with Unique Events/Occurrences.

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux.
I have a Discord for chatting and updates. Feel free to join!

No User Persona needed but it can help to add something along the following:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is naked.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV or AnyPOV.
